title: May 23, 2026
sentiment: Some things survive the hands that made them, and that survival is its own kind of love.

stories.title: Microsoft open-sources "the earliest DOS source code discovered to date"
stories.summary: Ancient source code, released into the light — the tools we build on outlive the people who built them, and someone always opens the box again.

stories.title: The Art of Money Getting
stories.summary: Balzac's old maxims on money and craft surface on a cool tools blog — the durable principles outlast the platforms that carry them.

stories.title: Alexander Grothendieck Revolutionized 20th-Century Mathematics
stories.summary: Grothendieck saw structures that existed before he named them — the mathematician as archaeologist of ideas that were already there.
